sn10.6:1.1:
1
Ekaṁ samayaṁ āyasmā anuruddho sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā anuruddho rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya dhammapadāni bhāsati. Atha kho piyaṅkaramātā yakkhinī puttakaṁ evaṁ tosesi:
sn10.6:1.2:
2
"Mā saddaṁ kari piyaṅkara,
Bhikkhu dhammapadāni bhāsati;
Api ca dhammapadaṁ vijāniya,
Paṭipajjema hitāya no siyā.
3
Pāṇesu ca saṁyamāmase,
Sampajānamusā na bhaṇāmase;
Sikkhema susīlyamattano,
Api muccema pisācayoniyā"ti.
